request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。

      "source_text": "於亞洲區內，為極需我們服務的",

      "current_translation": "Mr. Xie Shirong\nIndependent Non-Executive Chairman",

    {
      "block_id": "p10_b10",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "我們的同事關懷社群，克盡己職，",
      "current_translation": "our colleagues cared for the community and fulfilled their duties,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.495,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 15,
      "bbox": [

        232.92,
        302.87,

      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,

    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b11",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "持續為數以百萬計的客戶",
      "current_translation": "continuing to provide uninterrupted support to millions of customers",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.343,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 11,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        256.92,
        242.87,
        276.48
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b13",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "友邦保險在亞洲歷史悠久，源遠流長，經歷各種社會動盪和不明朗時期仍能妥善管理業務，因而贏得卓著的",
      "current_translation": "AIA has a long and distinguished history in Asia. Having successfully navigated various periods of social upheaval and uncertainty, we have earned an outstanding",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.704,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 47,
      "bbox": [

      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b14",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流",
      "current_translation": "reputation that reflects our trustworthiness, resilience and commitment to doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created a constantly evolving and increasingly complex business environment, with unprecedented shifts in political, macroeconomic and capital market conditions. In such an environment,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [

        486.7,

        498.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {

      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，",
      "current_translation": "AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives have become even more significant. I am deeply grateful to all AIA employees, agents and partners who, despite facing the most severe challenges, have cared for the community, fulfilled their duties and remained focused on providing support to our customers,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,

      "char_count": 49,

    },
    {

      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、",
      "current_translation": "Due to the impact of COVID-19 control measures on new business sales, new business value declined to US$2.765 billion. We quickly adopted innovative digital tools to enhance operational efficiency, and with the recent relaxation of movement restrictions, sales momentum recovered strongly and continued into early 2021.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 48,
      "bbox": [

        534.7,

        546.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b18",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "其家庭以及我們的社區提供支援。",
      "current_translation": "Compared with the same period last year, new business value in the first two months of 2021 grew by 15%.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 15,
      "bbox": [

    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b19",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "由於2019冠狀病毒病相關的控制措施對新業務銷售造成影響，新業務價值下降至27.65億美元。我們迅速採用",
      "current_translation": "Operating profit after tax increased by 5% to US$5.942 billion, while underlying free surplus generated rose by 7% to US$5.843 billion, reflecting the high quality of our recurring earnings sources. Embedded value equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's Local Capital Adequacy Ratio was",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        582.71,
        529.77,
        594.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b21",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "與去年同期比較，2021年首兩個月的新業務價值增長15%。",
      "current_translation": "The Board recommends a final dividend of HK$1.0030 per share, an increase of 7.5%, reflecting the strength and resilience of our financial performance and the Board's continued confidence in the Group's future prospects. This brings the full year dividend for 2020 to HK$1.3530 per share. The Board continues to follow AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable",

      "fit_status": "overflow",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 29,
      "bbox": [

        626.66

      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p10_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "經常性盈利來源。內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元。截至2020年12月31日，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為",
      "current_translation": "Recurring earnings sources. Embedded value of equity reached a new high of USD 67.2 billion. As of December 31, 2020, the Group's local capital adequacy ratio was",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",

      "current_translation": "374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",

      "current_translation": "The Board recommends a final dividend of HK$1.0030 per share, an increase of 7.5%, reflecting our solid and resilient financial performance, while the Board remains confident in the Group's",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.571,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        73.68,
        710.72,

        722.68

    },
    {

      "current_translation": "future prospects. This brings the full-year dividend for 2020 to HK$1.3530 per share. The Board adheres to AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable,",

      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
